description: Summarize schema for orders+users revenue by city query
question: What is the total revenue by city in the last 30 days?
raw_schema:
-- Delivery addresses per user. Each user can have multiple addresses; one is marked as default.
Table: addresses
  address_id integer  -- PK
  user_id integer  -- FK → users.user_id
  type character varying nullable
  street_line1 character varying nullable
  landmark character varying nullable
  city character varying nullable
  state character varying nullable
  country character varying nullable
  pincode character varying nullable
  is_default boolean nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  updated_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   addresses.user_id → users.user_id  [many addresses → one users]

-- Customer orders with full financial breakdown: subtotal, discount, GST tax (18%), shipping fee, grand total. Join with users table to get city-level or region-level order analysis. Use grand_total for average order value (AOV) calculations. Use created_at to filter by date range (e.g. last 30 days, last 6 months).
Table: orders
  order_id integer  -- PK
  order_uuid uuid
  user_id integer  -- FK → users.user_id
  address_id integer nullable  -- FK → addresses.address_id
  coupon_id integer nullable
  status character varying nullable
  subtotal numeric nullable
  discount numeric nullable
  tax numeric nullable
  shipping_fee numeric nullable
  grand_total numeric nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  updated_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   orders.user_id → users.user_id  [many orders → one users]
  --   orders.address_id → addresses.address_id  [many orders → one addresses]

-- Stores all registered customer accounts including profile info, contact details, email verification status, and account status (active/inactive/banned). Contains city field — join with orders to get city-level or region-level analysis.
Table: users
  user_id integer  -- PK
  user_uuid uuid
  first_name character varying nullable
  last_name character varying nullable
  full_name character varying nullable
  email character varying
  password_hash character varying nullable
  phone character varying nullable
  city character varying nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  updated_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  is_email_verified boolean nullable
  status character varying nullable

question: What is the total revenue per product in the last 30 days?
raw_schema:
-- Delivery addresses per user. Each user can have multiple addresses; one is marked as default.
Table: addresses
  address_id integer  -- PK
  user_id integer  -- FK → users.user_id
  type character varying nullable
  street_line1 character varying nullable
  landmark character varying nullable
  city character varying nullable
  state character varying nullable
  country character varying nullable
  pincode character varying nullable
  is_default boolean nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  updated_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   addresses.user_id → users.user_id  [many addresses → one users]

-- Brand master data including country of origin and product segment. Use only when the query specifically asks about brand names, brand performance, or filtering by brand.
Table: brands
  brand_id integer  -- PK
  name character varying
  slug character varying nullable
  country character varying nullable
  segment character varying nullable
  is_active boolean nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable

-- Product categories with support for parent-child hierarchy (e.g. Electronics → Mobile Phones). Self-referencing via parent_category_id. Join with products to filter by category name.
Table: categories
  category_id integer  -- PK
  name character varying
  parent_category_id integer nullable  -- FK → categories.category_id
  slug character varying nullable
  is_active boolean nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   categories.parent_category_id → categories.category_id  [many categories → one categories]

-- Individual line items within an order, each referencing a product variant with quantity. Use this table ONLY when the query requires product-level analysis (e.g., revenue by product, category, or variant). Do NOT join this table when calculating overall order revenue. For total business revenue or monthly revenue, use SUM(orders.grand_total) from the orders table. Join with orders to apply date filters, join with product_variants → products to get product names.
Table: order_items
  item_id integer  -- PK
  order_id integer  -- FK → orders.order_id
  variant_id integer  -- FK → product_variants.variant_id
  quantity integer nullable
  unit_price numeric nullable
  total_price numeric nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   order_items.order_id → orders.order_id  [many order_items → one orders]
  --   order_items.variant_id → product_variants.variant_id  [many order_items → one product_variants]

-- Customer orders with full financial breakdown: subtotal, discount, GST tax (18%), shipping fee, grand total. Join with users table to get city-level or region-level order analysis. Use grand_total for average order value (AOV) calculations. Use created_at to filter by date range (e.g. last 30 days, last 6 months).
Table: orders
  order_id integer  -- PK
  order_uuid uuid
  user_id integer  -- FK → users.user_id
  address_id integer nullable  -- FK → addresses.address_id
  coupon_id integer nullable
  status character varying nullable
  subtotal numeric nullable
  discount numeric nullable
  tax numeric nullable
  shipping_fee numeric nullable
  grand_total numeric nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  updated_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   orders.user_id → users.user_id  [many orders → one users]
  --   orders.address_id → addresses.address_id  [many orders → one addresses]

-- Each product can have multiple variants (SKUs) with distinct price, stock quantity, and weight. Bridge table between products and order_items. Required for product-level revenue queries. Join with products to get product names and with order_items to calculate revenue per variant.
Table: product_variants
  variant_id integer  -- PK
  product_id integer  -- FK → products.product_id
  sku character varying
  price numeric nullable
  stock_qty integer nullable
  weight_kg numeric nullable
  status character varying nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   product_variants.product_id → products.product_id  [many product_variants → one products]

-- Core product catalog with name, description, brand, category, base price, and status. Join with product_variants to get stock levels. Join with order_items and orders to calculate revenue per product in a date range.
Table: products
  product_id integer  -- PK
  product_uuid uuid
  name character varying
  description text nullable
  brand_id integer nullable  -- FK → brands.brand_id
  category_id integer nullable  -- FK → categories.category_id
  base_price numeric nullable
  slug character varying nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  updated_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  status character varying nullable
  -- JOIN hints:
  --   products.brand_id → brands.brand_id  [many products → one brands]
  --   products.category_id → categories.category_id  [many products → one categories]

-- Stores all registered customer accounts including profile info, contact details, email verification status, and account status (active/inactive/banned). Contains city field — join with orders to get city-level or region-level analysis.
Table: users
  user_id integer  -- PK
  user_uuid uuid
  first_name character varying nullable
  last_name character varying nullable
  full_name character varying nullable
  email character varying
  password_hash character varying nullable
  phone character varying nullable
  city character varying nullable
  created_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  updated_at timestamp without time zone nullable
  is_email_verified boolean nullable
  status character varying nullable
